SEARCH
Package project2_root.models

Class ZReportModel

java.lang.Object
project2_root.models.ZReportModel
All Implemented Interfaces:
Model
public class ZReportModel extends Object implements Model
Model for previewing, generating, and reviewing Z-reports.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    ZReportModel(POSDatabase database)
    Creates a Z-report model backed by the shared database interface.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    canGenerateZReport()
    Returns whether the current business day can be closed with a new Z-report.
    ZReportSummary
    generateZReport()
    Finalizes the current business day and persists its Z-report.
    double
    getAverageOrderValueToday()
    Returns the average order value for the active business day.
    ZReportSummary
    getCurrentZReportPreview()
    Builds an in-memory preview of the Z-report without finalizing it.
    int
    getOrderCountToday()
    Returns the number of orders since the last Z-report cutoff.
    double
    getTotalSalesToday()
    Returns the sales total since the last Z-report cutoff.
    List<ZReportSummary>
    getZReportHistory()
    Returns previously generated Z-reports in reverse chronological order.

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • ZReportModel

      public ZReportModel(POSDatabase database)
      Creates a Z-report model backed by the shared database interface.
      Parameters:
      database - the database used to query and finalize Z-reports

  • Method Details

    • canGenerateZReport

      public boolean canGenerateZReport()
      Returns whether the current business day can be closed with a new Z-report.
      Returns:
      true if a Z-report may be generated now

    • getTotalSalesToday

      public double getTotalSalesToday()
      Returns the sales total since the last Z-report cutoff.
      Returns:
      the current sales total for the active business day

    • getOrderCountToday

      public int getOrderCountToday()
      Returns the number of orders since the last Z-report cutoff.
      Returns:
      the current order count for the active business day

    • getAverageOrderValueToday

      public double getAverageOrderValueToday()
      Returns the average order value for the active business day.
      Returns:
      the average order value, or 0.0 when no orders exist

    • getCurrentZReportPreview

      public ZReportSummary getCurrentZReportPreview()
      Builds an in-memory preview of the Z-report without finalizing it.
      Returns:
      a preview summary for the current business day

    • generateZReport

      public ZReportSummary generateZReport()
      Finalizes the current business day and persists its Z-report.
      Returns:
      the generated Z-report summary

    • getZReportHistory

      public List<ZReportSummary> getZReportHistory()
      Returns previously generated Z-reports in reverse chronological order.
      Returns:
      historical Z-report summaries
